name: Barbecue Sauce (Wagner/spade)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Add onions and cook, covered, until they are golden brown.
2. Combine tomato paste and apple juice in a bowl and blend well. Stir in the remaining ingredients except honey. Bring to a simmer and cook for 20 minutes, adding water if needed to prevent thickening. The sauce should be thick at the end of cooking time.
3. Remove from heat and stir in honey.
4. Blend until smooth using a blender or food processor.
